Name: Landmark
Description (with reference to nouns): having a fixed location, as on a map

Name: Path
Description (with reference to nouns): showing changes in location along a particular direction or path

Name: Scene
Description (with reference to nouns): bringing to mind a particular setting or physical location

Name: Near
Description (with reference to nouns): often physically near to you (within easy reach) in everyday life

Name: Toward
Description (with reference to nouns): associated with movement toward or into you

Name: Away
Description (with reference to nouns): associated with movement away from or out of you

Name: Number
Description (with reference to nouns): associated with a specific number or amount

Name: Time
Description (with reference to nouns): an event or occurrence that occurs at a typical or predictable time

Name: Duration
Description (with reference to nouns): an event that has a predictable duration, whether short or long

Name: Long
Description (with reference to nouns): an event that lasts for a long period of time

Name: Short
Description (with reference to nouns): an event that lasts for a short period of time

Name: Caused
Description (with reference to nouns): caused by some clear preceding event, action, or situation

Name: Consequential
Description (with reference to nouns): likely to have consequences (cause other things to happen)

Name: Social
Description (with reference to nouns): an activity or event that involves an interaction between people

Name: Human
Description (with reference to nouns): having human or human-like intentions, plans, or goals

Name: Communication
Description (with reference to nouns): a thing or action that people use to communicate

Name: Self
Description (with reference to nouns): related to your own view of yourself, a part of YOUR self-image

Name: Cognition
Description (with reference to nouns): a form of mental activity or a function of the mind

Name: Benefit
Description (with reference to nouns): someone or something that could help or benefit you or others

Name: Harm
Description (with reference to nouns): someone or something that could cause harm to you or others

Name: Pleasant
Description (with reference to nouns): someone or something that you find pleasant

Name: Unpleasant
Description (with reference to nouns): someone or something that you find unpleasant

Name: Happy
Description (with reference to nouns): someone or something that makes you feel happy

Name: Sad
Description (with reference to nouns): someone or something that makes you feel sad

Name: Angry
Description (with reference to nouns): someone or something that makes you feel angry

Name: Disgusted
Description (with reference to nouns): someone or something that makes you feel disgusted

Name: Fearful
Description (with reference to nouns): someone or something that makes you feel afraid

Name: Surprised
Description (with reference to nouns): someone or something that makes you feel surprised

Name: Drive
Description (with reference to nouns): someone or something that motivates you to do something

Name: Needs
Description (with reference to nouns): someone or something that would be hard for you to live without

Name: Attention
Description (with reference to nouns): someone or something that grabs your attention

Name: Arousal
Description (with reference to nouns): someone or something that makes you feel alert, activated, excited, or keyed up in either a positive or negative way
